name: Ayushman Bharat — PM-JAY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana)
description: Free health insurance up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Covers 1,900+ procedures.
eligibility: Families identified from SECC 2011 data. Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in or call 14555.
how_to_get: No enrollment needed if eligible. Show Aadhaar at any empanelled hospital. Ayushman Card can be made at CSC or hospital.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: Cash assistance for pregnant women delivering in government health institutions. Promotes institutional delivery.
eligibility: Pregnant women, especially BPL families. Amount varies by state (₹600-₹1,400).
how_to_get: Register at nearest ANM/ASHA/PHC during pregnancy. Deliver at government hospital.

name: Jan Aushadhi Scheme (PMBJP)
description: Quality generic medicines at 50-90% cheaper than branded. Available at 9,000+ Jan Aushadhi Kendras across India.
how_to_get: Find nearest store at janaushadhi.gov.in or call 1800-180-6060.

name: RNTCP / NTEP (National TB Elimination Programme)
description: FREE testing and treatment for Tuberculosis. Includes ₹500/month nutrition support (Nikshay Poshan).
eligibility: Anyone with TB symptoms. All types of TB covered.
how_to_get: Visit any government health facility. Free sputum test. Free medicines for 6+ months.

name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)
description: Free HIV testing and antiretroviral treatment (ART) at government centres. Confidential testing.
eligibility: Anyone can get tested. Free ART for all HIV+ patients.
how_to_get: Visit any ICTC (Integrated Counselling and Testing Centre) at district hospitals. Free and confidential.

name: Universal Immunization Programme (UIP)
description: Free vaccination for children and pregnant women against 12 vaccine-preventable diseases.
eligibility: All children 0-5 years and pregnant women.
how_to_get: Visit nearest PHC/ASHA/Anganwadi centre on immunization day (every Wednesday/RBI day).
